title: Property Consultant - ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd!
